name: vendedor-scz-storefront
description: Vitrina comercial estática de Vendedor SCZ para GitHub Pages.

scripts.preview: npm run build --silent && node tools/server.mjs --root dist --port 4173 --base /Prueba2/
scripts.lint: npm run lint:js && npm run lint:css && npm run lint:html
scripts.check:content: npm run build --silent && node tools/check-content.mjs dist
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e
scripts.check: npm run build --silent && npm run lint:js && npm run lint:css && html-validate "dist/**/*.html" && node tools/check-content.mjs dist && node --test "tests/unit/*.test.js" && playwright test && npm run audit:lighthouse && npm run audit:deps
